articles.title: WPIL Ltd Barred From Future MP Jal Nigam Tenders For Up To 3 Years, Company Says Existing Business & Operations Will Not Be Affected
articles.description: Indian stock markets ended the holiday-shortened week with gains, keeping the positive trend intact. Analysts believe the Nifty could move higher if it crosses 24,500, while the Sensex may rally towards 79,000. Falling crude oil prices and easing geopolitical tensions have improved investor confidence.
